name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.BodyBalanceHelper.ReturningToBalanceArmsOut
summary: Range 0:1 0 = don't raise arms if returning to upright position, 0.x = 0.x*raise arms based on angvel and 'angle' settings, 1 = raise arms based on angvel and 'angle' settings.
remarks:
Default value = 0.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
